reference: I bumped my forehead yesterday and today it feels very bruised to the touch, but there is no bruise showing. I also do not feel good at all, but I am not sure if I am just overtired as my husband is away on a work trip and I have been running around for the past week after my one-year-old.
text: I bumped my forehead yesterday, and today it feels very bruised at the touch. But there is no breeze showing. I also do not feel good at all. But I am not sure if I am just over tired, as my husband is away on a work trip, and I have been running around for the past week after my one-year-old.
